item.title: word_count
item.description: Vault Stats This vault currently contains 14,308 words across all notes.

item.title: Gameplan
item.description: General Goal of this page is to outline a plan of what to do in different scenarios.

item.title: Z guard
item.description: General Variant of Half guard, which should prevent Stacking and therefore allow you to prevent opponent from passing as easily.

item.title: Hip Bump sweep
item.description: General Sweep available from Closed guard where you elevate hips and sweep opponent Can lead to the sweep or alternatively to Triangle and Kimura Steps Unbalance opponent to make them post hands on mat .

item.title: Lumberjack & Waiter
item.description: General Available when opponent is in your closed guard and has risen to standing.

item.title: Ankle pick
item.description: General Great setup for standing where you literally pick up the opponents ankle to look for variety of different takedowns Setup Forward arc Get a Thumb and cuff grip on the opponents Sleeve on the same side.

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Author I am a 34 year old white belt, who started 10/2023.

item.title: Back, standing
item.description: Possibly after Arm drag or otherwise you both are standing and you have obtained opponents back.

item.title: K guard sweep
item.description: General Control is exactly the same as in K guard, and the sweep direction is towards opponents 10-11 o’clock (assuming control on left leg as usual) After the opponent is swept to their knees you have way too many options to pursue: Calf slicer Heel hook Crab ride .
